# Haram Textile — Full Reference

## Company Overview

Haram Textile is a manufacturer and exporter of textile and knitted garments in Pakistan, founded December 19, 2009. Haram Textile strives to set standards of excellence for providing quality textiles to its customers, emphasizing customer satisfaction as key to success.

"Our continuous growth, has made us a trustworthy manufacturing partner of world's best brands."

Haram Textile is one of the leading textiles and garments manufacturing exporters in Pakistan, with a complete setup from knitting, dyeing, sewing, printing, embroidery, and packing.

As one of the most prominent apparel manufacturers in Pakistan and around the globe, Haram Textile believes that the possibilities are endless and it is this philosophy that has helped drive the company toward sustainability in fashion.

## Mission, Vision & Values

- Mission: Sustainable, quality growth.
- Vision: Assist customers' needs with best knowledge, experience and technology.
- Values: Team Work, Association, Faithfulness.

## Why Manufacture in Pakistan

- 4th largest cotton producer globally
- State-of-the-art spinning sectors
- Produces combed, ring, spun, and heather yarns
- 400 spinning mills with 10 million spindles
- 37% share in world cotton yarn markets
- Diversified fabric making plants
- Large-scale sewing infrastructure

## Quality & Social Compliance

Haram Textile believes in quality products and is committed to providing quality products by meeting customer requirements through continual improvement at every stage of the manufacturing process.

Haram Textile is eternally committed to the highest standards of social and environmental responsibility, and always assumes liability for the social, ecological, and economic consequences of its activities — from manufacturing through delivery.

Haram Textile is very selective in the purchase of all raw materials, especially yarn, to ensure consistent quality production. Special attention is also focused on production processes like knitting, dyeing, cutting, and stitching. Entire customer satisfaction is the company's foremost goal.

## Production Capacity

- 220 specialized machines
- 350 workers and staff
- 30,000 sq ft factory area
- 600,000 pieces/month packing capacity
- 160 sewing machines

## Leadership Team

- Mr. Rashid Mehmood — CEO (rashid@haramtextile.com)
- Mr. Aamir — Managing Director (aamir@haramtextile.com)
- Hafiz Adnan Gulzar — Export & Marketing (adnan@haramtextile.com)
- Mr. Farman — Export & Marketing (farman@haramtextile.com)

## Product Line

Right from yarn to making fabrics of different quality in cotton, synthetic, blends like viscose/modal, polyester, melanges, yarn dyed, organic, compact yarn, etc., produced in-house in huge knitting and state-of-the-art dyeing facilities.

Main product line: knitwear articles, T-shirts, polo shirts, sweat shirts, basic and fashionable jogging suits, leggings, bike shorts, tops for ladies and girls, underwear, and pants in solid/print, with fabrics including 100% cotton, 95% cotton/5% Lycra, and microfiber with Lycra.

### Product Categories

- **Boys Collection** — Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits
- **Girls Collection** — Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits
- **Ladies Collection** — Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits
- **Men's Collection** — Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits

## Manufacturing Process

1. **Knitting** — Equipped with state-of-the-art knitting machines for all types of knitted fabric: Fleece, French Terry, Single Jersey, Interlock, Pique, 1x1 Rib, 2x2 Rib, Flat Back Rib, Thermal, Feeder Striped, Engineer Striped, and Jacquard knitted fabric.
2. **Dyeing** — State-of-the-art dyeing with finishes including In-side Brushing, Peaching Effect, Enzyme washed, mercerized stone washed, plus garment washing: burn-out washed look, stone washed look, mineral dyeing with wash, Tie & Dye garment wash, Dip Dye garment wash, etc.
3. **Cutting** — CAD/CAM system for pattern designing and grading to reduce fabric wastage and enhance usability; manual laying and cutting production runs parallel to meet stitching induction needs.
4. **Printing** — Screen Printing, Heat Transfer, Puff print, Rubber Print, high-density print, flocking, Glitter print, water paste printing, oil paste printing, Foil printing, discharge printing, and Photo print. A well-equipped design studio supports production of up to 5,000 garment cut panels per day.
5. **Embroidery** — A general range of Embroidery Machines producing designs from simplest to most complex, with quick turnaround on both small and large volumes.
6. **Sewing** — 160 sewing machines with a complete range of gauges and attachments: hemming machines with left-hand knife, multi-needle chain lock machines, blind hemming machines for t-shirts, elastic & lace attaching machines, automatic binding cutter machines, continuous fusing machines for interlining, and built-in head lights on every machine.
7. **Finishing & Packing** — The last process before shipping; a well-trained packing team meets customer requirements with a capacity of more than 600,000 pieces/month.

## Certifications

Quality always plays a vital role in Haram Textile's growth. A team of highly skilled, professional, and qualified QA members contributes efficiently towards achieving superior quality.

- ISO 9001:2008 (certified by ACS)
- Oeko Tex 100 by AITEX Spain Class II
- BSCI certified

- Map: https://goo.gl/maps/HQGkbQmFPTbADm3n6

## B2B Inquiries

Haram Textile welcomes B2B wholesale, private-label, and bulk export inquiries from international brands, importers, and retailers. To request a quote, use the Contact page and include:

- Target product category (boys, girls, ladies, or men's collection)
- Approximate order quantity
- Preferred fabric type
- Destination country

The export and marketing team typically responds to new inquiries within one to two business days during office hours.
